Host)
%s://%s/url/page1z
/url/leaf?path_info=/page1z
%s/page1z
/url/?path_info=/page1z
/url/leaf?path_info=./page1z!/url/leaf?path_info=other/./page1z
%s/url/other/page1z
/url/?path_info=/other/./page1z
%s/other/page1z$/url/?path_info=/other/././././page1z
/url/leaf?path_info=../page1z"/url/leaf?path_info=other/../page1z#/url/leaf?path_info=/other/../page1z)/url/leaf?path_info=/other/../../../page1z//url/leaf?path_info=/other/../../../../../page1z
/url/qs?qs=/otherz
%s/url/qs?/otherz
/url/qs?qs=/other/../page1z
%s/url/qs?/other/../page1z
/url/qs?qs=../page1z
%s/url/qs?../page1z
/url/qs?qs=../../page1z
%s/url/qs?../../page1z#/url/?path_info=page1&relative=TrueZ
page1z(/url/leaf?path_info=/page1&relative=Truez
../page1z'/url/leaf?path_info=page1&relative=Truez,/url/leaf?path_info=leaf/page1&relative=Truez
leaf/page1z*/url/leaf?path_info=../page1&relative=Truez,/url/?path_info=other/../page1&relative=Truez#/baseurl?path_info=ab&relative=TrueZ
abz$/baseurl?path_info=/ab&relative=Truez)/url/leaf?path_info=page1&relative=serverz
/url/page1z%/url/?path_info=page1&relative=serverz*/url/leaf?path_info=/page1&relative=serverz
